recommendations.title: The Grinch
recommendations.overview: The Grinch hatches a scheme to ruin Christmas when the residents of Whoville plan their annual holiday celebration.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Alien Xmas
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Fantasy, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A young elf mistakes a tiny alien for a Christmas gift, not knowing her new plaything has plans to destroy Earth's gravity — and steal all the presents.

recommendations.title: Meet the Robinsons
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Lewis, a brilliant young inventor, is keen on creating a time machine to find his mother, who abandoned him in an orphanage. Things take a turn when he meets Wilbur Robinson and his family.

recommendations.title: Trolls Holiday
recommendations.overview: When the eternally optimistic Poppy, queen of the Trolls, learns that the Bergens no longer have any holidays on their calendar, she enlists the help of Branch and the rest of the gang on a delightfully quirky mission to fix something that the Bergen

recommendations.title: Lou
recommendations.overview: A Pixar short about a lost-and-found box and the unseen monster within.

recommendations.title: Super Mario Brothers: Great Mission to Rescue Princess Peach
recommendations.overview: When Princess Peach is kidnapped by the monster King Koopa, Mario and his brother Luigi journey to the Mushroom Kingdom to rescue her.

recommendations.title: Trolls World Tour
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Adventure, Music
recommendations.overview: Queen Poppy and Branch make a surprising discovery — there are other Troll worlds beyond their own, and their distinct differences create big clashes between these various tribes. When a mysterious threat puts all of the Trolls across the land in dan

recommendations.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace
recommendations.overview: Master Yoda must go retrieve secret battle plans. However, things become a little more complicated when a class of younglings join the mission.

recommendations.title: Barbie in A Mermaid Tale
recommendations.overview: Barbie stars as Merliah, a surfer who learns a shocking secret: she's a mermaid! She and her dolphin friend set out for an undersea adventure to rescue her mother, the queen of Oceana.
